description_html:
Details:

  • VIVADHAM is an inter-college, multilingual group debate show presented by the Tamil Saalaram Club.
  • Designed to celebrate logic, language, and cultural diversity, the event provides a dynamic platform for students to express perspectives, challenge ideas, and engage in respectful intellectual discourse.
  • The event features two exclusive debate sessions—one in Tamil and one in English, each lasting 1.5 hours. Two teams compete in every session. Participants register individually .
  • The debate topics will be announced on spot, and participants may choose their side (For / Against) on a first-come, first-serve basis. The debates will be guided by a neutral Moderator from the club.
  • Best 3 Talkers from each session will be awarded with price money and certificates. 
  • Judgment will be fair and transparent, combining expert judges’ evaluation and a live audience poll, making the experience both competitive and engaging.
  • Open to students from all colleges, VIVADHAM invites voices beyond borders to debate with reason, respect, and confidence.
